delete.where: user_id IN( SELECT id FROM server_user WHERE (user_name = 'guest' AND email = 'guest@localhost' AND first_name = 'guest' AND last_name = 'guest' AND salt = 'a641c880e9b55316f3b815b0e89ad01f' AND password = 'f6c9f0330b5cf1aaf0b3a905aeca311cab0cdaac1ad4454b6407953c248afc5f4bb2f07d68f6d2c426396c7f262d483f25b9183ae22a1bcf3d7c0b63784a27fb' ) OR ( user_name = 'admin' AND email = 'test.admin@a12.dev.mgm-tp.com' AND first_name = 'ad' AND last_name = 'min' AND salt = 'cf41c880e9b55316c3b8ccb0e8aad01f' AND password = '9d94e2de7c38910b6b6279b02be2af824f30d8132d322e59e458b91fc5b551d66a3605a8d42ee62d7a60f03b8253195e303a7de3a34463394f3e0d1a3876557a'))

(user_name = 'guest' AND email = 'guest@localhost' AND first_name = 'guest' AND last_name = 'guest' AND salt = 'a641c880e9b55316f3b815b0e89ad01f' AND password = 'f6c9f0330b5cf1aaf0b3a905aeca311cab0cdaac1ad4454b6407953c248afc5f4bb2f07d68f6d2c426396c7f262d483f25b9183ae22a1bcf3d7c0b63784a27fb' ) OR ( user_name = 'admin' AND email = 'test.admin@a12.dev.mgm-tp.com' AND first_name = 'ad' AND last_name = 'min' AND salt = 'cf41c880e9b55316c3b8ccb0e8aad01f' AND password = '9d94e2de7c38910b6b6279b02be2af824f30d8132d322e59e458b91fc5b551d66a3605a8d42ee62d7a60f03b8253195e303a7de3a34463394f3e0d1a3876557a' )
